title: Responsible Conduct of Research (RCR) — D-RED Seminar Slides (Isuk)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-11-09 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Responsible Conduct of Research (RCR)' presented by Edet Isuk, PhD. Distinct from the New Faculty Development RCR session by Isuk on 2022-11-14 (form_rcr_isuk_2022_newfaculty) and the longer-form RCR powerpoint at form_rcr_powerpoint. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/iGtBuSCPsAp0r0LAAFQClE9yt5t6laBclLTLV92ECu1M7gjSbHlZ0jdlKlBLFTDl.1W-uyjuuozkjBN3x
